data.name: 偶像調教事件簿
data.detailed_description:
◆遊戲故事

在街上偶遇了你心心念念的偶像桃香，但她似乎遇到了什麼困難……

看著她的恐懼和無助，你決定出手相救！帶她逃離私生飯和狗仔、替她保守秘密，並且為她提供遠離紛擾的庇護所。

你再也不是普通的追星狗，而是作為桃香可以依靠的對象，一起展開美好甜蜜的同居生活。♥

與喜愛的偶像秘密生活在同一個屋簷下，你給予她戀人一般的溫暖：

一起吃飯睡覺、安慰她的失落、傾聽她的心事……讓她笑、和她做各種醬醬釀釀的事。

你和她都認為：這樣的幸福生活會一直持續下去。

直到你發覺桃香似乎有了自己的小秘密……

外表光鮮的演藝圈中，有來自輿論與緋聞的打擊、經紀公司的潛規則、激進的飯圈文化和吸血的家人……你能在這些混亂的事件裡，能得到桃香全心全意的愛嗎？

「只有把妳關進我親手打造的牢籠裡，妳才能真正遠離一切紛擾。所以……別想離開我，知道嗎？」

◆遊戲故事

「只有把妳關進我親手打造的牢籠裡，妳才能真正遠離一切紛擾。所以……別想離開我，知道嗎？」
data.short_description: 這是一款時間管理戀愛模擬AVG。身為小粉絲的你意外收留了偶像桃香，展開同居生活。你將透過每日行程安排與對話選項，影響你們的關係發展：兼職賺錢、應援演唱會、送禮提升好感等……攻略她，讓她敞開心扉，解鎖更多親密劇情。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 越南文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Idol Forging
data.detailed_description:
◆Game Story



You run into Momoka, the idol you've been dreaming of, on the street, but she seems to be in some kind of trouble...
Seeing her fear and helplessness, you decide to step in and save her! You help her escape from sasaeng fans and paparazzi, keep her secret, and provide her with a sanctuary away from the chaos.
You're no longer just an ordinary fan; you've become someone Momoka can rely on. You get to be close to her and start a sweet, wonderful life together. ♥



Living secretly under the same roof with your favorite idol, you give her the warmth of a lover:
Eating and sleeping together, comforting her when she's down, listening to her worries... making her laugh, and doing all sorts of intimate things.

You both believe this happy life will last forever.
Until you realize Momoka seems to have her own little secrets...



In the glamorous world of entertainment, there are attacks from public opinion and scandals, unspoken rules from the agency, aggressive fan culture, and parasitic family members... Amidst all this chaos, can you win Momoka's wholehearted love?



"Only in the cage I've built with my own hands, can you truly be safe from all the chaos. So... don't even think about leaving me, understand?"

data.short_description: A time-management romance sim AVG. As a fan, you take in idol Momoka to start living together. Influence the relationship via daily schedules & dialogue choices: work, cheer at concerts, give gifts... Win her heart, make her open up, and unlock intimate scenes.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Vietnamese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (64-Bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT630 or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
